{"problem_standardized_math":"Using the reference accumulation formulas for the binary operation \(x_i=x_j+x_k\),\n\[\nD_p x_i = D_p x_j + D_p x_k, \qquad D_{pq} x_i = D_{pq} x_j + D_{pq} x_k,\n\]\ndefine analogous formulas for accumulating the first derivatives \(D_p x_i\) and the second derivatives \(D_{pq} x_i\) when \(x_i\) is obtained from each of the following binary operations: \(x_i=x_j-x_k\), \(x_i=x_jx_k\), and \(x_i=x_j/x_k\)."}
